name: Tex-Mex Breakfast Taco

ingredients.item: Freshly chopped parsley and cilantro, two tbsp.

method: Add a little olive oil in the pan.
Cut the tomatoes, jalapenos, onions, and cilantro.
Cook the Smithfield Breakfast Sausage per package instructions.
Add the beaten eggs and scramble, set aside.
Chop the potatoes into small cubes and cook with a little bit of olive
oil, garlic, salt and pepper until they are slightly crispy.
Heat the tortilla in a frying pan and add the shredded cheese.
Combine the potatoes, eggs, and sausage and mix well.
Serve your dish with fresh salsa.
